Codeforces Rating from Table 1 ('GPT performance on academic and professional exams') of the GPT-4 Technical Report, for the RLHF/launch GPT-4 model, described as 'below 5th percentile' among competitive programmers. Estimated by having the model attempt problems from 10 recent Codeforces contests (10 attempts/problem) and running repeated Elo-adjustment simulations to convergence (100 simulations x 10 contests), per Appendix A. GPT-3.5 scored 260 on the same table for comparison. This is a distinct evaluation protocol from Table 2's few-shot academic benchmarks (base, pre-RLHF model) already in the corpus, but is the same kind of Codeforces-Elo-rating metric used for other models' 'codeforces' entries in this corpus.
